bird.summary: The bay wren (Cantorchilus nigricapillus) is a species of bird in the family Troglodytidae. It is native to southern Central America and no…

locations.name: 中美洲
locations.summary: 中美洲（英語：Central America，西班牙語：América central）是一個地理概念。依據不同的劃分法，屬於北美洲或南美洲的一部分，一般指連接北美洲與南美洲之間的地峽，現有七個國家（若算入墨西哥則為八個）。 範圍 範圍北…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Bay wren
relations.evidence: It is native to southern Central America and northwestern South America.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/ |title=IOC World Bird List (v 11.1) |last1=Gill |first1= F

relations.subject: Bay wren
relations.evidence: It inhabits dense, fairly low, vegetation such as thickets along watercourses, overgrown clearings, roadsides, and the understory of secondary forest
